title: Checkout failing with NullPointerException since this morning
body:
p99 latency on /checkout jumped from 600ms to 7s and error rate is up sharply since ~09:05 UTC. Sampled stack trace:

java.lang.NullPointerException
  at com.demo.cart.CartService.applyPromo(CartService.java:88)
  at com.demo.cart.CheckoutController.checkout(CheckoutController.java:54)

All regions affected. Looks like every customer with an older cart is hitting it.
